122.reason: [Error: q is already advanced to q->next, so q->last may be NULL or invalid; also, freeing inside the loop without proper ordering causes use-after-free or double-free issues]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: q is already advanced to q->next, so q->last may be NULL or invalid; also, freeing inside the loop without proper ordering causes use-after-free or double-free issues]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: q is already advanced to q->next, so q->last may be NULL or invalid; also, freeing inside the loop while traversing can cause use-after-free or double-free issues. The correct approach is to free nodes after traversal or use a separate pointer.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  frees after advancing q; causes use‑after‑free and invalid free when q becomes NULL
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Dereferencing NULL pointer when q becomes NULL at the end of the list, causing a segmentation fault. Additionally, the last node is never freed.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Dereferences NULL pointer when q becomes NULL at loop termination, causing runtime crash; also incorrect memory freeing logic.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Attempting to free memory using 'q->last' after 'q' has already been advanced; when q becomes NULL, q->last is invalid. Also, freeing nodes in this manner leads to double-free or invalid free because 'last' pointers are not managed correctly.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Attempting to free memory using q->last after q has been advanced; when q becomes NULL, q->last is invalid. Also, freeing nodes in this manner leads to double-free or invalid free because the same node may be freed multiple times or accessed after being freed.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing p->last = NULL; initialization, leading to undefined behavior when traversing the list backwards.
